violations.text: The floors in the walk in cooler and wall behind mop sink(observed hole) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

The floors behind equipment in the back storage have an small accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the retail area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
The hand-washing sink in the front retail area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

The refuse area around the dumpster was observed with litter and debris. Refuse areas must be maintained free of debris to help prevent pest harborage and must be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
The floors in the walk in cooler and wall behind mop sink(observed hole) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
